text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a maelstrom of fervor and excitement, the
curtain falls on the Twinkle Star Climax.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All the spectators are celebrating the emergence
of the greatest racer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Reporter Otonashi also takes the opportunity to
express her deep gratitude for all my help in
making the event a reality!
